The question is asking to calculate the difference in attendance between Gamestorm 10 and Gamestorm 11. Since both attendances are numerical values, we can subtract the attendance of Gamestorm 11 from Gamestorm 10 using the formula: difference = attendance(gamestorm 10) - attendance(gamestorm 11). This will give us the difference in attendance between the two events.

The difference in attendance between GameStorm 10 and GameStorm 11 can be calculated by subtracting the attendance of GameStorm 11 from GameStorm 10. The attendance for GameStorm 10 was 750 and the attendance for GameStorm 11 was 736. Therefore, the difference in attendance is 750 - 736 = 14.
